overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a white coat exploring a futuristic spaceship or station interior. The character walks through a control room with NPCs at workstations and continues down a metallic industrial corridor toward a large circular airlock door.

events.description: character begins walking forward from the control desk area toward the corridor

agents.ego_description: standing near a control desk then walking toward the corridor entrance

notable_agents.action: seated at a control desk operating computer terminals
seated in a yellow chair near equipment lockers

entered.detail: large dark desk with multiple computer monitors and control panels
glowing display screens showing data readouts and schematics
large metallic ventilation pipes running along the ceiling
tall grey storage lockers against the wall
bright yellow ergonomic office chair with metallic frame

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit spaceship control room with industrial metal flooring and overhead piping. The character stands near a control desk where an NPC operates computer terminals, while another NPC sits in a distinctive yellow chair nearby. The character begins walking forward, passing the workstations.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area leading to main industrial corridor

events.description: exits the control room and enters the main industrial corridor with overhead piping

agents.ego_description: walking past the seated NPC in the yellow chair and proceeding into the corridor

notable_agents.action: seated in a yellow chair, watching the character pass by

entered.detail: white electrical equipment boxes and crates stacked near the wall
structural frame marking the entrance to the main corridor

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the NPC in the yellow chair and transitions from the control room into a narrow industrial corridor. The space features exposed overhead piping and metal flooring. Equipment crates and utility boxes line the walls as the character proceeds deeper into the spaceship interior.

events.description: approaching a large circular airlock door at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor toward the circular airlock door at the end

entered.detail: large circular metallic door with mechanical hinges and locking mechanisms, suggesting a spaceship airlock
yellow and black diagonal hazard stripes painted on the metal floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the empty industrial corridor, leaving the control room area behind. The corridor features warning stripes on the floor and exposed machinery. Ahead, a large circular airlock door dominates the end of the hallway, growing larger as the character approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit control room into a narrow industrial corridor that culminates at a massive airlock. It begins beside a control desk where an NPC operates computer terminals and another sits in a distinctive yellow chair, with the character walking forward past these workstations. As the character moves beyond the yellow chair, the space transitions from the open control room into a confined hallway characterized by exposed overhead piping and metal flooring. The scene then shifts deeper into the spaceship interior, passing equipment crates and utility boxes before the floor reveals warning stripes and exposed machinery. Finally, the camera proceeds down the empty corridor as a large circular airlock door dominates the view, growing larger and more imposing as the character approaches.
